existing_scheduler_modules.name: scripts/local-autonomous-scheduler.ts
existing_scheduler_modules.description: Stateful local scheduler using SchedulerStateEngine. Tick loop, reconciliation, JobRunLog writes.
existing_scheduler_modules.reason: Writes JobRunLog to production DB. Tied to autonomous trading job lanes. Cannot safely add regime report lane.

existing_scheduler_modules.name: src/app/api/cron/daily-sync/route.ts
existing_scheduler_modules.description: Daily sync: calls runAllSyncs, createDailySnapshot, generateDailyAlerts, deliverAlerts
existing_scheduler_modules.reason: Writes multiple production DB tables. Calls external TWSE APIs. Not safe to wrap for regime report.

existing_scheduler_modules.name: src/lib/data/SyncScheduler.ts
existing_scheduler_modules.description: runAllSyncs job orchestrator. Executes stock_master, stock_price, institutional, market_index, revenue sync.
existing_scheduler_modules.reason: Writes SyncLog and triggers full data sync. Not safe to hook regime pipeline into.

existing_scheduler_modules.name: src/lib/jobs/SchedulerStateEngine.ts
existing_scheduler_modules.description: State machine for job scheduling. Reads/writes JobRunLog. Manages job lanes.
existing_scheduler_modules.reason: Writes to JobRunLog (production). Changing lane config risks disrupting autonomous trading jobs.

existing_freshness_guard_modules.name: src/lib/jobs/AutonomousDashboardService.ts
existing_freshness_guard_modules.description: Reads dataCoverage from DailyMarketSnapshot. Not a standalone freshness guard.

existing_freshness_guard_modules.name: scripts/backfill-taiex-gap.py
existing_freshness_guard_modules.description: Python TAIEX gap backfill from TWSE. Supports --dry-run / --apply. Writes only MarketIndex table.
existing_freshness_guard_modules.reason: Already used in T-05/T-06. Only writes MarketIndex. Has --dry-run safety. SAFE TO WRAP.

reusable_components: scripts/backfill-taiex-gap.py - safe TAIEX freshness check and backfill
components_must_not_reuse: src/app/api/cron/daily-sync/route.ts - writes DailyMarketSnapshot, triggers external APIs
src/lib/data/SyncScheduler.ts - writes SyncLog, calls external TWSE APIs
StrategySignal, SimulatedTrade, StrategyProposal - must not touch
production_write_risk: HIGH - TypeScript scheduler writes JobRunLog, SyncLog, DailyMarketSnapshot. Python pipeline must be standalone.
external_api_risk: HIGH - TypeScript daily-sync hits TWSE external endpoints. Python pipeline limited to TAIEX via backfill-taiex-gap.py.
strategy: Option 2 - standalone Python pipeline (run-daily-regime-aware-pipeline.py). Create integration proposal for future TypeScript hook.
